curation.synopsis: On the swamp-bound world of Solo-Baston, the Imperium's grip is slipping as an indigenous uprising swells under the banner of the enigmatic Dos Pares. Colonel Fyodor Baeder and the 31st Riverine Regiment, bayou-born guardsmen who cut their teeth fighting swamp orks back home, are sent upriver to reclaim weaponry vital to the war effort, only to be bled white by a ferocious native resistance. As Baeder pushes deeper into the jungle, he uncovers a rebellion that is far more than it seems, its roots fed by the corrupting hand of the Ruinous Powers. A brutal, mud-and-blood campaign of attrition that pushes a single regiment to the edge of annihilation, and its commander to the edge of his faith.
